items.title: Facebook considers giving up and becoming TikTok

items.title: Microsoft pressures LG into killing unwanted McAfee ads
items.description: Microsoft has intervened to stop Windows 11 users with LG monitors from being bombarded with annoying McAfee trial pop-ups. items.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
items.description: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media.
